summary: Frontend hardening patch testing completed. All 12 features tested - 11 PASS, 1 INFO (CaseStrengthMeter component exists but not integrated into UI). All shared components (StrengthBadge, VerificationBadge, LegitimacyPanel, EvidenceSummary, AssessmentNote, ReportMetadataPanel) are working correctly. Text replacements verified: 'Case Strength' replaced, 'Platform Pattern Indicators' visible, 'Higher Preparation Grounds' visible.

integration_issues.issue: Component exists at /app/frontend/src/components/CaseStrengthMeter.jsx with correct 'Appeal Preparation Readiness' block implementation, but is not imported/rendered anywhere in the app. The component has data-testid='case-strength-meter' and shows readinessScore/100 format.
integration_issues.note: Component is ready for integration - just needs to be imported and rendered in CaseDetail.jsx Progress tab

action_items: OPTIONAL: Import and render CaseStrengthMeter component in CaseDetail.jsx Progress tab to display 'Appeal Preparation Readiness' block
critical_code_review_comments: All 6 shared components correctly implemented with data-testid attributes
StrengthBadge.jsx: Shows STRONG/MODERATE/WEAK badges with correct colors
LegitimacyPanel.jsx: Shows Legal basis, Evidence support, Appellate viability scores (X/3 format)
EvidenceSummary.jsx: Shows Supporting Evidence with document references
AssessmentNote.jsx: Shows disclaimer notes for AI-generated content
ReportMetadataPanel.jsx: Shows model, fallback, documents analysed metadata
GroundsOfMerit.jsx: Correctly integrates StrengthBadge, VerificationBadge, LegitimacyPanel, EvidenceSummary per ground card
DeadlineTracker.jsx: Shows explanatory note 'Deadlines may include user-managed procedural reminders...'
BarristerView.jsx: Shows BarristerGroundBlock with all sub-components and AI-analysis footer
ReportView.jsx: Shows VerificationBadge and AI-analysis footer
CompareCasesPage.jsx: Shows AssessmentNote and 'Platform Pattern Indicators' label
CaseDetail.jsx: Shows Review Status widget with Unverified grounds, AI-generated timeline events, Draft reports counters
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend hardening patch verified. All shared components working. CaseStrengthMeter component exists but not rendered - may be intentional design choice or pending integration.
